title.en: Multiple Stages of System Development Life Cycle

prose.en: Employ anti-tamper technologies, tools, and techniques throughout the system development life cycle.

guidance.en: The system development life cycle includes research and development, design, manufacturing, acquisition, delivery, integration, operations and maintenance, and disposal. Organizations use a combination of hardware and software techniques for tamper resistance and detection. Organizations use obfuscation and self-checking to make reverse engineering and modifications more difficult, time-consuming, and expensive for adversaries. The customization of systems and system components can make substitutions easier to detect and therefore limit damage.

prose.en: anti-tamper technologies, tools, and techniques are employed throughout the system development life cycle.

objects.en: Supply chain risk management policy and procedures
procedures addressing tamper resistance and detection
tamper protection tools and techniques documentation
tamper resistance and detection tools (technologies) and techniques documentation
acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
Organizational personnel with system and services acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with supply chain risk management responsibilities
Organizational processes for employing anti-tamper technologies
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing anti-tamper technologies

nist-withdrawal.label: SA-18(01)
nist-withdrawal.title: Multiple Phases of System Development Life Cycle
